channel.title: Awesome Search KG
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Awesome Search KG

item.title: Doug Turnbull
item.description: Doug Turnbull Co-founder of OpenSource Connections (OSC); co-author of Relevant Search (O’Reilly).

item.title: Jina AI
item.description: Jina AI Berlin-based AI company focused on multimodal embeddings and neural search infrastructure.

item.title: Context Engineering
item.description: Context Engineering Context engineering is the process of deciding which information from all available context sources actually enters the LLM’s context window so the model can generate the best response.

item.title: Leonie Monigatti
item.description: Leonie Monigatti Developer advocate / ML engineer at Elastic. Writes about agentic search, context engineering, and RAG.

item.title: Agentic Search for Context Engineering
item.description: Agentic Search for Context Engineering Long-form write-up of the workshop given at AI Engineer Europe 2026 (London, April 8, 2026).

item.title: Home
item.description: Awesome Search — Information Retrieval & Search Knowledge Graph Semantic knowledge graph built from the Awesome Search curated list.

item.title: Enterprise Search
item.description: Enterprise Search Definition Enterprise search is search applied to internal organizational content — documents, emails, files, messages, wikis, databases, and other knowledge assets — to help employees find information they need to do their work.

item.title: Kleinanzeigen - Vespa Migration for Homepage Feed
item.description: Kleinanzeigen — Vespa Migration for Homepage Feed Context Kleinanzeigen (Germany’s largest classifieds marketplace) migrated their homepage personalized feed from Elasticsearch to Vespa.

item.title: Kleinanzeigen
item.description: Kleinanzeigen Germany’s largest online classifieds marketplace, serving millions of users daily. Formerly known as eBay Kleinanzeigen.

item.title: Vespa
item.description: Vespa What They Build Vespa is an open-source big data serving engine originally developed by Yahoo and now maintained as an independent open-source project (vespa.ai).
